title: sophora tetraptera subsp. fernandeziana
intro: Sophora tetraptera subsp. fernandeziana is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as a type of Sophora or Kowhai tree. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sophora tetraptera subsp. fernandeziana include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
